recommendation.verdict: No candidate window strictly dominates baseline (5). Across the C9 grid, larger windows show small but consistent regressions on dom_share, sybil_delta, and honest_worst, while only marginally reducing double_win. Bump NOT recommended — keep cooldown=5. Best candidate audit: window=6, improves=[], regresses=['dom_share', 'sybil_delta', 'rollover', 'honest_worst'].
